text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap garners attention as the Hero from the
Countryside.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek, who will be going up against Oguri
Cap in the autumn Tenno Sho, has become a
villain in the eyes of the public.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Embracing the role, she decides to run the race as
the villain, declaring her intention to defeat
Oguri Cap.
